task_completion.description: Open the Bologna Pasubio scenario in SUMO-GUI
task_completion.visual_evidence: SUMO-GUI application window is visible, displaying a road network.

task_completion.description: Change the edge/lane coloring scheme to 'by current speed'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The roads in the SUMO-GUI network view are colored according to speed (e.g., varying colors like red, yellow, green instead of uniform colors), or the View Settings dialog is visible with 'by current speed' selected under the Street or Edge/Lane tab.

task_completion.description: Run the simulation until at least time step 500
task_completion.visual_evidence: The time step indicator (usually at the top toolbar of the SUMO-GUI window) shows a value of 500 or greater.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the network view to '~/SUMO_Output/congestion_map.png'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'congestion_map.png' is visible in the '~/SUMO_Output/' directory in a file manager, terminal, or image viewer.
A file named 'visualization_settings.xml' is visible in the '~/SUMO_Output/' directory in a file manager, terminal, or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the SUMO-GUI application rather than just creating files via terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of SUMO-GUI being open and interacted with (e.g., dialog boxes, menus, or simulation running) in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The saved screenshot is an actual image of the SUMO-GUI network view
integrity.visual_evidence: If the 'congestion_map.png' file is opened or previewed, it shows the SUMO-GUI network view with colored roads, not a blank or unrelated image.

integrity.description: The visualization settings file was generated by exporting from SUMO-GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: If the 'visualization_settings.xml' file is opened, it contains valid SUMO visualization XML tags, not just dummy text or a manually typed placeholder.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected scenario is 'bologna_pasubio'. The screenshot must be saved to exactly '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/congestion_map.png'. The visualization settings must be exported to exactly '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/visualization_settings.xml'. The simulation must be run to at least time step 500.
